message:
fix(packages): harden update_package_sources against malformed settings

Replace unwrap() on re-fetched packages field after mutation with
guarded normalization that resets to an empty array when the field is
not an array, and returns an error instead of panicking on non-object
root. Add two regression tests covering non-array packages field and
non-object root edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
